opinion.h2: John JENSEN and Mortimer Bye, petitioners, v. Anthony J. LORENZ and Mark H. Wodlinger. No. 521.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Mr. C. Russell Riordon, of Washington, D. C., for petitioners.
For opinion below, see 68 App.D.C. 39, 92 F.2d 992.
Petition for writ of certiorari to the United States Court of Appeals for the District of Columbia denied.
Rehearing denied 302 U.S. 780, 58 S. Ct. 366, 82 L.Ed. --.[ Jensen v. Lorenz (1937) ]
